# Projects
# Format: title | url | date (YYYY-MM-DD) | tags | thumb | status (active/archived/wip) | description | slug
# slug is optional — auto-generated from title if omitted. It sets the project's canonical
# address: v4.run/projects/<slug>/. Set it explicitly if you ever rename the title, so the
# URL (and anything that's already linked to it) doesn't change.
# Long-form write-up for each project lives in content/projects/<slug>.md

title: Judiciary Tracker
url: https://github.com/varun-heman
date: 2026-03-01
tags: judiciary, open data, tools
thumb: https://picsum.photos/seed/judtracker/400/300
status: active
description: A live tracker for case pendency, disposal rates, and judge vacancy data across India's High Courts. Pulls from public court websites and presents trends in a readable format. Built because the data exists but is buried in PDFs and inaccessible tables.
slug: judiciary-tracker

---

title: Court Scraper
url: https://github.com/varun-heman
date: 2025-11-15
tags: judiciary, open data, tools
thumb: https://picsum.photos/seed/courtscraper/400/300
status: active
description: A set of scrapers for Indian court websites — district courts, High Courts, and the Supreme Court. Standardises case data into a consistent schema so it can actually be used for analysis. Frustrating to build, surprisingly useful once running.
slug: court-scraper
